headline: Oracle Taps Hilary Maxson As CFO To Steer AI Infrastructure Push
summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) has appointed Hilary Maxson as its new Chief Financial Officer. Maxson brings experience in infrastructure investment and business transformation from roles at Schneider Electric and AES Corporation. The CFO change comes as Oracle is investing heavily in AI infrastructure and reshaping its business model. Oracle sells enterprise software and cloud services and is currently focused on building out AI infrastructure for customers. That requires large, ongoing capital...

headline: How Adobe is setting a good example for the software sector

Guggenheim Securities senior software research analyst and senior managing director John DiFucci joins Yahoo Finance to discuss Adobe's AI push and to explain why he doesn't think software companies are going anywhere.

headline: Alphabet Stock Has Further to Run, Analyst Says. Share Are Falling Anyway.
summary: Alphabet stock has been on a tear recently but the market is still under-appreciating Google’s cloud unit growth, according to KeyBanc analysts.  KeyBanc  raised their price target on Alphabet to $380 from $370 on Sunday, as lead analyst Justin Patterson said the consensus was underestimating the “Google Cloud ramp.”  Google Cloud offers computing services which allow users to store and analyze data on the internet.
